name: quick actions exclude repeated failed approach

source.purpose: Regression coverage from playtest fixture F12. After a failed Intimidation roll, the next quick actions should not keep offering multiple versions of the same failed pressure lane.

narrator.prose: The clerk stops answering that version of the demand.

inputActions: Lean on the writ until he breaks. [Intimidation]
Read the room before you commit. [Insight]
outputActionsInclude: Read the room before you commit. [Insight]
outputActionsExclude: Lean on the writ until he breaks. [Intimidation]
